description_long: This is a freestanding wooden cabinet with a rich, dark brown finish and a slightly mottled texture. The cabinet features two main sections: a taller compartment with a large door that has an oval glass panel, and a shorter section with two drawers above a smaller door. Brass or gold-toned handles are present on the drawers and doors, adding a touch of elegance. The base is sturdy and slightly raised, providing stability and a classic look. The overall design suggests it could be used for storage in urban environments such as entryways, garages, or offices, and the glass panel allows for partial visibility of the contents inside.
description: A dark brown, freestanding wooden cabinet with an oval glass panel, drawers, and brass handles, suitable for urban storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main door with an oval glass panel, two drawers, a smaller door, and all visible handles.
description_view_1: Side view of the taller section, showing a flat, unadorned wooden panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, continuous wooden back of both sections, with no openings or hardware.
description_view_3: Side view of the shorter section, showing the side of the drawers and the smaller door, with minimal detail.
